placement_note: Round of 32 placement uses a deterministic approximation. It separates same-group teams where possible, but it is not the official FIFA third-place placement matrix.
todo: Replace deterministic approximation with official FIFA third-place placement matrix when finalized/needed.
analyst_explanation: Argentina is the most likely champion in this simulation set at 11.2%. Group J looks strongest by combined title probability. Argentina profiles as the main dark horse at 11.2% title probability. South Africa has one of the most uncertain group-stage paths. These are Monte Carlo estimates from the structured match model, not guarantees. The Round of 32 placement uses a deterministic third-place approximation rather than an official FIFA matrix.
